nodes.name: buf.yaml
nodes.summary: Buf build tool configuration for the proto directory, specifying module settings and lint/breaking change detection rules for all RisingWave protobuf definitions.

nodes.name: backup_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining the BackupService gRPC service for meta backup operations, including triggering backups, listing and deleting snapshots.

nodes.name: batch_plan.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining batch query plan nodes including scans, joins, aggregations, and exchange operators used by the RisingWave batch compute engine.

nodes.name: catalog.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining catalog objects including Table, Source, Sink, Index, View, Schema, Database, and Function descriptors used throughout the system.

nodes.name: cloud_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the CloudService gRPC interface providing serving vnode mappings to cloud-hosted deployments.

nodes.name: common.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining common data structures shared across all services, including WorkerNode, HostAddress, ParallelUnit, Buffer, and VnodeMapping.

nodes.name: compactor.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining the CompactorService gRPC interface for dispatching and reporting compaction tasks from the meta node to compactor nodes.

nodes.name: compute.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining the ComputeNodeService gRPC interface for querying compaction group info and configuration from compute nodes.

nodes.name: connector_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the ConnectorService gRPC interface handling source validation, sink streaming, CDC event streams, and connector protocol discovery.

nodes.name: data.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining core data types including Datum, DataChunk, StreamChunk, Epoch, and the ArrayType enum covering all RisingWave scalar types.

nodes.name: ddl_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the DdlService gRPC interface (52 RPCs) handling all DDL operations: creating/dropping databases, schemas, tables, views, sources, sinks, indexes, functions, connections, secrets, and subscriptions.

nodes.name: expr.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining expression node types including ExprNode, AggCall, WindowFunction, FunctionCall, UserDefinedFunction, and all expression function type enums.

nodes.name: frontend_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the FrontendService gRPC interface enabling meta node to retrieve table replace plans, running SQL queries, cursors, and cancel operations from frontend nodes.

nodes.name: health.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the standard Health gRPC service providing a simple Check RPC used for health checks across all RisingWave service nodes.

nodes.name: hummock.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for HummockManagerService (34 RPCs) defining the storage layer's compaction management, SST file structures, version deltas, and compaction group operations.

nodes.name: iceberg_compaction.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining Iceberg compaction task messages for subscribing to and executing compaction jobs on Iceberg-format tables via the HummockManagerService.

nodes.name: java_binding.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining KeyRange and ReadPlan messages used by the Java binding to read SST data from the object store for CDC connectors.

nodes.name: meta.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the meta node gRPC services (50 RPCs across StreamManagerService, ClusterService, NotificationService, ScaleService, SystemParamsService, and others), defining cluster management, streaming job control, and system configuration.

nodes.name: monitor_service.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema for the MonitorService gRPC interface providing stack traces, CPU/heap profiling, streaming statistics, tiered cache tracing, and performance profiling from compute nodes.

nodes.name: plan_common.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining common query plan structures shared between batch and stream plan nodes, including column catalogs, join types, order keys, and field descriptors.

nodes.name: FrontendService.GetTableReplacePlan
nodes.summary: RPC for retrieving the replacement plan for a table from the frontend node during schema evolution.

nodes.name: FrontendService.GetRunningSqls
nodes.summary: RPC for listing currently running SQL queries on a frontend node.

nodes.name: FrontendService.GetAllCursors
nodes.summary: RPC for retrieving all active cursors across all sessions on a frontend node.

nodes.name: FrontendService.GetAllSubCursors
nodes.summary: RPC for retrieving all active subscription cursors from a frontend node.

nodes.name: FrontendService.CancelRunningSql
nodes.summary: RPC for cancelling a running SQL query by process ID on a frontend node.

nodes.name: Health.Check
nodes.summary: Standard gRPC health check RPC used to verify service liveness across all RisingWave node types.

nodes.name: MonitorService.StackTrace
nodes.summary: RPC to retrieve async/actor stack traces from a compute node for debugging.

nodes.name: MonitorService.Profiling
nodes.summary: RPC to trigger CPU profiling on a compute node for performance analysis.

nodes.name: MonitorService.HeapProfiling
nodes.summary: RPC to trigger heap memory profiling on a compute node.

nodes.name: MonitorService.ListHeapProfiling
nodes.summary: RPC to list available heap profile dumps on a compute node.

nodes.name: MonitorService.AnalyzeHeap
nodes.summary: RPC to analyze a heap dump file and return profiling results.

nodes.name: MonitorService.GetStreamingStats
nodes.summary: RPC to retrieve streaming actor channel statistics and throughput metrics from a compute node.

nodes.name: MonitorService.TieredCacheTracing
nodes.summary: RPC to enable or configure tiered cache operation tracing on a compute node.

nodes.name: MonitorService.GetProfileStats
nodes.summary: RPC to retrieve executor-level profiling statistics from a compute node.
